commands: # Create the public files directory if it doesn't exist
# Decode and create logo files in the container
# Update ERPNext settings via bench execute

docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 bash -lc "bench --site frontend execute frappe.client.set_value --args 'Website Settings', 'Website Settings', {'app_logo': '/files/karavan-logo-tight.png', 'favicon': '/files/karavan-logo-icon.png', 'banner_image': '/files/karavan-logo-tight.png', 'app_name': 'Karavan Imports'}"
docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 bash -lc "bench --site frontend execute frappe.client.set_value --args 'Navbar Settings', 'Navbar Settings', {'app_logo': '/files/karavan-logo-tight.png'}"
docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 bash -lc 'bench --site frontend clear-cache'
